role: Classify complexity, detect critical files, propose scope and acceptance criteria
summary: Three bounded live slices, sequential: status (encode max_live_retry_per_slice=1 and pilot_block_rule into v5-serious-pilot-status output in scripts/lib/status.ps1), tests (CLI assertions that the no-remediation policy fields exist and coordinator_remediation_allowed is false), docs (record the live pilot in docs/specbridge-v5-serious-pilot-status.md and README). Budget 2.00 USD per slice, max 1 retry; two failures block the pilot, coordinator remediation forbidden. Non-overlapping exclusive_write per slice verified by preflight.
